extraction.one_line_summary: MCCARTHY Jay won a bunch sprint after a late breakaway reabsorption inside final 500 meters, Matthews completely absent from finale positioning.
tactical_patterns: Bora-Hansgrohe's Mühlberger worked heavily for breakaway before sprint setup, revealing dual-purpose domestique positioning strategy.
UAE's late leadout materialized only inside 500m after breakaway caught, suggesting reactive rather than controlled sprint preparation.
Alaphilippe sat up early believing position secured, prioritizing GC safety over stage result despite being competitive.

rider_signals.MCCARTHY Jay: positive: delivered convincing win by half-length with perfectly timed kick despite not being pre-race favorite
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: completely absent from finale positioning despite expected sprint contention, suggesting form or team support issues
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: deliberately sat up before line prioritizing GC time gaps over bonus seconds, revealing conservative yellow jersey defense
rider_signals.HULKOFF Michal: positive: contested sprint effectively after heavy breakaway work, showing unusual dual-role capacity
